mxCell.value: Inform customer DPA has failed and end call
Select reason for call from level 1
From level 1 selection, level 2 selection is selected
Wait for customer to repeat Otac
Enter Otac from customer and click next
From level 2 selection, level 3 selection is selected
Steps to Triage calls (Find the correct process to use)
OTAC is the OTP used as a security pin
Explain bundles to customer and time period apply
Select Apply credit on drop down
Apply the voucher number in textbox
Get Authorization from Manager in person
Fill in Cheque form with customer specifics
Click on subscription under account summary
Click on customers name under account summary
Fill in fields to add clubcard
Select appropriate product from drop down
